ABVX_2025.text:
16 Jul - This is when things first started getting interesting - the volume is rising the EMAs are in the right alignments.
The volume was clearly catching up - there was insider buying here
Looks to me a gap and go? the gap is so wide and the subsequent move held LoD of the gap opening range. Waited for 10 EMA to catch up then just trailed along 20 EMA. A nice move

3 Dec - Test of faith as 20 EMA broke and did not reclaim the next day. 
The top was near

AGX_2025.text: Started getting interestng here with tightness and EMA alignments
5/6 May could be a possible entry on the break of the prior high

9 Jun - Test of faith on strong selloff with volume. 
Should probably exit the next day
16 Sep - tightness after an undercut and reclaim. A possible entry
This entire move up would have been difficult to hold given the constant pullback to below 20 EMA

ALAB_2025.text:
18 Jul was arugably when things atarted becoming interesting but not yet tradable. 
The stock based in this range since May and before that had a round bottom. The range is very tight

21 Jul was when the pivot happened, 
Strong volume breakout from the base. Tradable with a stop that is perhaps 8% below LoD?

29 Jul Also a great entry with pricing sitting just above 10EMA. 
Could have been a low risk entry with say stop just below 20 EMA
9 Aug Second EP day. Volume was strong again tradable with a stop below 8% fo LoD

APLD_2025.text: First Consolidation above the 200 EMA, Things are setting up
Breakout from downtrend line with volume, Possible entry

Retest of support but dragged on dfor most of Jun and Jul. 
Most likely  I would have given up here

Tried to breakout but  then immediately moved back into the 50 EMA. 
Still tight action but again where I would have been stopped out because it just moved all the way below LoD of the breakout bar on 17 Jul
31 Jul - probably a EP, gapped up with volume. The next day was a nasty candle to test 10MA but held up well - a possible entry

9 Sep - a test of faith the few bars before broke 10 and 20 EMA and 
held 50EMA to recover back up to both 10 and 20 EMA - this is not easy
The rest of the move respected the 10 EMA and broke on 22 Oct. A good run on this leg

ARWR_2025.text:
Q2 AU chop: 49% 10EMA, 10 50SMA touches in 43 days.
Stock goes nowhere. UNTRADABLE basing.

12-week clean 10EMA streak
Aug 8 - Oct 31
Meets gold-standard 8+ week threshold

Nov 26: +20% intraday on 7.1M vol
Explosive single-day move
Reward phase, not entry

Dec 8: +9% gap close@52% = MID
Not a clean real EP
Late in parabolic phase

May 13: +13% gap on 2.5x vol
close@25% = TRAP EP
Skip. [NOTE] This was below 200EMA

ENTRY #1: Aug 12/13 when price broke out from 200EMA and took off. 
Volume followed. EMA alignments looking bullish

4-wk tight consolidation
Oct 24 - Nov 21
0 50SMA touches, -13% DD

ADD: Nov 24 base breakout ~$44
Stop $37 (below base)
Becomes parabolic — runner only
[NOTE] There was also a shaekout U&R andcolume was strong

Zooming out this was a breakout downtrend retest that held - 
the subsequent setup became much more believable

ASTS_2025.text:
This was an interesting point because things started moving when it broke the trendline.
The volume was good the EMAs alignments were super bullish
9 Jul first test of faith, would have exited

22 Sep this is a follow through day after EMA reclaim and the EMA alignments were right. 
Coould be an entry against the EMAs as the stop (just below)

30 Sep - 2nd low risk entry, price pulled right into 10 EMA on low volume, held
Next day the share price broke top of the range and go
21 Oct - this was when you should just exited when the gap up got filled and we close below t10 EMA

AU_2025.text:
reclaim the 200EMA and started showing tightness.
This was when things started looking interesting
30 Jan was an interesting 1st entry. Gapped up, held. Broke resistance but volume was average

28 Feb, true test of faith. opened below 50EMA but closed up.
Difficult spot
5 Mar is a possible entry it reclaimed the EMAs and the EMAs are tight. Exit at just below  LoD

10 Mar, test of faithe again. 
Could get stopout
7 Apr Again Test of faith, down to 50EMA and held

AVAV_2025.text:
27 May was the first day it started becoming interesting. Tightness above 200 EMA.
The other EMAs are aligning for greatness

25 Jun was arguably a EP day. The move gapped above the consolidation range with volume. It closed in the middle of the range.
It is a buyable entry potentially
5 Sep was test of faith it touched the LoD of the EP. It held for 2 days
10 Sep was the potential entry. It gapped above the EMAs, The EMAs tangled up. The stop could be LoD.
16 Sep - also a potential entry as it broke the top of the range of the consolidation jsut above the EMAs.

BE_2025.text:
Very interesting area in Jun Jul right before the point of pivot. The stock is coming out of a 3 month 
base with EMAs re-aglining to bullish pattern. The price is consolidating in a tight range and holding 20MA
10 Jul is the first interesting entry point whereby the price gapped up and move strongly above the former resistance
The subsequent moves erased all the gain and moved back into the 20MA. A hard one to hold

24 Jul was another EP style entry whereby it gapped up again
This time it was on strong volume and started pulling off
The retest was a couple of days later into the 10MA but D1 D2 after the gap were strong movement.

25 Sept was the test of faith. The entire move prior was well above 10MA.
This was a sharp gap down following a pull back the day before it tested 20MA and hold

29 Sept was arguably a undercut and reclaim of the 10MA. 
This was when you could potentially become bullish again

10 Oct was a nice tactical entry as well with price touching 10MA 
on a tight consolidation of >1 wk
Another EP on 13 Oct. Tradable but would be stopped out on 22 Oct on the undercut of 20EMA
Quick reclaim on 24 - This  wild price action is signaling a near top last rally

CAR_2025.text:
Q1 base: V-bottom from $54
39% 10EMA, still untradable
No structure yet

Leg 3 parabolic: 100% 10EMA
-9% DD (clean) but late-cycle
Runner only, no new position

Jul 29 parabolic TOP ~$213
Post-top collapse -35% in days
Exit signal

No EPs in this move
Pure technical breakout
Must trust character change

Possible ENTRY (AI): Apr 15 base breakout ~$70-78
Character change to 96% 10EMA (Q2)
Stop $64 / pure breakout — no EP catalyst
[Note] this was a strong candle with volume but probably not a good buy point except seeing EMAs setting up whilst still under 200EMA

21 Feb - Possible entry as broke out from 200EMA, 
bullish EMA alignments, prior day testing 200EMA and held

26 Jun looked a bit like a claimax top but turned out the retest held 10MA very well.
Should have exited 1/3 at this level though
30 Jul very clear exit signal. Could be a good signal to short
This area was probabaly difficult to short fgiven the chop
28 oct the gap up and sold down was a very bearish signal and was a good one to start shorting again
Entire move below 50 EMA was a shortable move but not easy

CIEN_2025.text: This is a large cup and handle formation, around 9 months. You could also potentially interpret  the movement inside this setup in the framework of VCP
This is a EP setup with large volume
The gap up was not tested, not filled, it largely followed EMA10.
This loos like an undercut and reclaim. Basically drop below 20 EMA and then reclaimed in 2 days with volume, showing support of 20 EMA
Possible ENTRY 1 breakout from consolidation range - see tightness in this area, stop should be low of range
Possible Entry 3 - consolidation after move up, not exactly HTF but tightness after a strong run and retested 10MA support and held. Low risk entry
First point when the chart should be taken seriously as all the EMAs are in right order and trending up

CIFR_2025.text:
First get interesting here as the bar broke out from the base and downtrendline
it crossed 200 EMA on volume. The pivot is the right classification. that was when things started getting interesting
Consider the bar on 18 Aug and undercut and reclaim. 10MA 20MA 50MA meet. This is strong bullish signal
Best Entry so far, 22 Aug, breakout from 3 day consolidation, holding all EMA the EMAs are aligned stop at low of the consolidation range

8 Sept - 2nd possible entry, undercut 10MA 2 days and held.
Low risk entry to stop out just below 20MA
First Test of faith on breakdown
29 Sept - Consider this an undercut and reclaim; back above 10MA. Entry with LoD the day before as stop
22 Oct: Here the chop became too much; range too wide, after the stop out should stay on the sideline but could get sucked right back into it.

CLS_2025.text:
May: Reclaimed 50SMA. Clean 10EMA trend starts.
12 weeks of steady grind — CIFR-quality.

Aug 5 EP: +9% gap on 2.5x vol.
Acceleration into new leg.

COHR_2025.text:
May-Aug: Clean 10EMA trend.
Tradable phase before the shakeout.

Aug 18: -32% shakeout in one week\!
Broke all MAs. Stop-out event.
Ends most positions.

CRDO_2025.text:
Q1: V-bottom from $29
73% 10EMA, -24% DD
No base yet

May 12: +10% gap
close@56% = MID
Not a clean real EP

Jun 3: +20% gap on 4.7x vol
close@6% = MASSIVE TRAP
Skip — signal of weakness

ONLY tradable leg
Q2: 88% 10EMA, 0 50SMA
Entry ~$78, Stop $72
Exit by Aug 5

Sep 4: +11% gap close@15% = TRAP
2nd trap — character deteriorating

Q4 BREAKDOWN
52% 10EMA, 6 50SMA touches, -34% DD
Chart falls apart

Nov 20: +8% gap close@5% = TRAP
3rd trap EP

Dec 2: +14% gap close@6% = TRAP
4th trap EP — WORST EP STOCK in library

CRWV_2025.text: 29 Apr is where tightness was formed

The entire move respected the 10MA and it broke out from the IPO high point with volume. 
This is the 1st Possible entry

This may actually be considered the second entry although in hindsight it was not where things worked out. 
Stop should be at low of range
8 Jul is where you would exit

DAVE_2025.text:
May 8 EP: +25% gap on 5.6x vol.
Close at 98% of range — TEXTBOOK strong EP.
Ran to $286 in 8 weeks along 10EMA.

FLNC_2025.text:
64% 10EMA, -39% DD, 81% underwater.
8.9% ADR — highest in library. Untradable.

GLXY_2025.text:
These price actions here around Jun Jul was starting to get a bit interesting. 
The price action not super tight but EMAs are in right alignment
16 Jul was a breakout entry. Would be a buy on the break of the top of the consolidation range

15 Aug showed a good example of a failed flag. 
Tight action followed by a break of candle crossing both 10 and 20 EMA

9 Sept could be considered an undercut and rally - typical of such a move. 
The 10 20 50 EMA are all tangled up, Price reclaimed everyone of it and started moving up
Entire move was tradable until 22 Oct when price closed below both 10 and 20 EMA

HOOD_2025.text:
This is where things start getting interesting. 
It reclaimed the 10 and 20 EMA and started consolidated above with all EMA re-aligning.

8 May would be a possible entry. The volume may not be there but it 
started breaking out from the consolidation range
Another tight consolidation zone whereby price tightened up above the 10 EMA for the entire May.
2 Jun - potential 2nd entry point as it broke out from the range
2-24 Jun could be considered a base above a base with tight action
Test of faith 5 Sept the entire August was a test and would not have held through that

8 Sep things atarted getting interesting again. 
Gap up with good volume and closed at high of bar. Possible day of entry
Clear break of trend here. Probably would exit

IONQ_2025.text:
Q1 base: 57% 10EMA, -28% DD
8.1% ADR — giant intraday swings
No entry structure

May 8: +9% gap close@69% = MID
Only qualifying gap in whole move

Q3 AU CHOP
49% 10EMA, 8 50SMA touches in 37 days\!
-21% DD — classic AU pattern

Q4 parabolic: 76% 10EMA but
STILL 8 more 50SMA touches\!
Total 17 — worst in library

NOT TRADABLE
17 50SMA touches, 8.1% ADR
64% underwater — narrative stock

IREN_2025.text: This Pivot marks the break of a trend line with good volume. Could be a posible second entry

Some level of tightness here with the chart getting a lot more interesting. the Moving averages are setting up and the stock itself is seeing tightness whilst holding 10MA. A very nice looking chart
A possible entry would be to set entry at the break of the tight range with stop below the range. The volume in this period is very bullish too
Here you have the first test of faith when share price plunges through the 10MA and 20MA but foudn support at the 50 The volume on pullback here is notably small
6 Aug could actually be considered an undercut and reclaim. It was back up on strong volume and above all EMAs

The entire half a month after the reclaim was very choppy for long
It is very easy to get stopped out and 20 Aug was the toughtest as it broke the low fo the consolidation range (but reclaim to close green). This should have been taken as a positive signal
Tightness in this range. Again a possible tradable entry on 28 Aug on breakout although it ended up as a squat
22 Aug arguably could be an entry although it is not the typical entry but it broke the top of the range and also the move before held 10MA consistently.
Gap up EP here, the subsequent move was choppy but again held largely low of the range on Day0 and met with 10 MA

This is a great entry on breakout of the top of the range. It tested the gap and held reclaimed to close green.

Subsequent move held 10MA entirely

JOBY_2025.text:
May 28 EP: +17%, 7.3x vol, close@81% = GOOD.
Jun 3 EP: +13%, close@9% = TRAP.
Jun 9 EP: +10%, close@80% = GOOD.

KSS_2025.text:
Q1 base: 56% 10EMA, 4 50SMA touches
Slow bottoming from $6

May 29: +12% gap on 2.6x vol
close@9% = TRAP EP

Jul 22: +90% MEGA SQUEEZE on 11.9x vol
close@22% = MASSIVE TRAP
Would destroy any holder

Aug 27: +26% gap close@60% = MID
Still not clean

Oct parabolic spike to ~$80
57% 10EMA, 11 50SMA touches
Volatile blow-off

Nov 25: +24% EP close@99% = REAL
Only clean EP but at TOP
Momentum trade only

KTOS_2025.text:
ENTRY: Apr 21 breakout ~$32
Character change from Q1 base
Stop $29 / Use 20EMA trailing
20EMA stock (87% adherence)

LEU_2025.text: First tightness with nice consolidation and good EMA alignment. This is the first Possible Entry - eith on retreat to 10EMA or on breakout. The stop is below low of the range.

This is a EP day. Also a breakout from the base. This is another possibel entry.

Can either enter here or wait for 2day to see if there is any weakness. Volume was multiple times of before
Track 10 MA really well. Nice swing
First test of faith, held 20MA. flat to consolidate
Another possible entrey. Potential Entry 3 - breakout from consolidation range
Should be a marginal exit if didn't the next day is the exit

This entire move since the breakdown in Aug and reclaim could be viewed as a mini undercut and reclaim, 
then you see tightness around 50EMA then tighness above 10 20 EMA, 10 20 EMA closely tangled, this is a high qualith entry

9 Sep is a high quality low risk entry, Possible Entry at breakout from consolidation range and stop at low of range
The entire move afterwards held 10MA very very well

LITE_2025.text:
ENTRY: May 50SMA reclaim ~$60
Stop ~$55
TRADABLE — gold standard

Nov 5: +16% EP close@71% = REAL
Add / momentum entry

MP_2025.text:
Price action was interesting in this range. 
Feb MAr we saw tightness and sideway action with EMAs lining up

Apr and May the price action was wild with constant crossing of the 2 EMAs.
The price eventually broke down to test 50 EMA - showing that generally difficult to trade something not ready to move yet

9 Jun broke out with increased volume but price action was not decisive. 
The closing price moved back into the resistance. The next day gap up was being sold off
11 Jun we saw one final shaekout test and hold movement. Very difficult

12 Jun we saw a strong move up breaking the resistance closing 
strongly with a FT the day after. This was the first decent entry

10 Jul the retest was brutal. It was a very bad test of faith that was almost
impossible to hold

10 Jul had a EP style gap up on government investment. 
Got sold off. 3 days later there was another gap up on apple news

Price action here became wide and loose.
Not a very tradable setup anymore and signaling top is near

MU_2025.text:
This was when things started getting interesting.
Things got tight at just above 200EMA. bullish alignment of EMAs emerging
3 Jun. First Potential Entry as it broke out from the range, low of the range as stop

4 Sep - second tightness formed. EMAs started becoming interesting. This day the candle started forming early breakout. 
A good entry with low of EMA as the stop loss
20 Nov - First exit as it broke 10MA

19 Dec, looked like a possible entry. EMAs re aligned and expanded
This candle broke the top of the range. The stop is just below 20 EMA

NBIS_2025.text:
Jun 5 EP: +5.2% gap on 4.9x vol. BEST ENTRY.
Day 2 ~$46-48, stop below gap low $41.40 (~13% risk).
Gap held for 2 months, never filled.

Aug 7 EP: +16.8% gap on 3.1x vol.
Day 2 ~$69, stop below $63 (~9% risk).
Alternative entry if missed Jun EP.

Sep 9 MONSTER EP: +52% gap on 6.6x vol!
Tradable but LATE in move (3.5x from low already).
Last leg - HOOD lesson applies. Momentum trade only.
Volume dried up to 0.3x of the avg
Early May Price started to consolidate above the 50 EMA and showed tightness

Jul 11: 58% retracement - AU territory.
Would have been very uncomfortable to hold through this.

Test of the low of the gap. Again followed by a EP - very difficultto hold after the chase. 
Sideway downward chop for 1mth+

OKLO_2025.text:
9 May - this is when things started to look interesting. 
All the EMAs are tangled up and the price action started become tight. 12 May was the first notable entry

13 May was also a possible entry with breakout on volume
Subsequent move was a base on top of a base. Another week long consolidation

Things got interesting on 11 Jun when the price broke out from the cup
and handle pattern and moved on strong volume
until 10 Jul the move was very challenging. It was a test of faith

14 Jun - 10 Sept the price action was 
horrible. A lot of deep pullbacks. Test of 50MA

12 Sept presented another opp. The prices are cleanly above all EMA and all EMA rising. 
This was near breakout point

25 Sept - still vividly remember how wildly this trades with the strong gap down and reclaim. 
The subsequent 4 day move was not nice neither. Another signal of near top behavior

OUST_2025.text: 63% 10EMA, 9 50SMA touches, -32.9% DD, 8.2% ADR.\nNOT TO MY STYLE. 8.2% ADR. Too volatile to hold.

PI_2025.text: 73% 10EMA, 9 50SMA touches, -21.5% DD, 5.1% ADR.\nPARTIALLY TRADABLE. PI respects 20EMA, not 10EMA. A 20EMA-style trade.

PL_2025.text:
Apr-May: Base tightening below all MAs.
Volume drying up. Range narrowing $3.10-3.60.
Constructive but not yet tradable.

Jul 1 EP TRAP: +16.9% gap to $7.72 high.
But closed at $6.16 — gave back ENTIRE gap!
Classic chase-and-reverse.

Sep 8 EP: +18% gap on 6.9x vol. THE REAL ONE.
Close $9.67 near high $9.71 = strong close.
Day 2 gap-down shakeout (-10.7%) but recovered.
Ran to $16+ in 4 weeks.

Oct-Nov: -37% correction from $16.78 to $10.52.
Broke below 10/20 EMA. Eventually 50SMA.
Entire Sep-Oct gain round-tripped.

Dec 11 EP: +22% gap on 5.5x vol.
Late-move EP but held and ran to $21.
Strong close near high.

Jun 5 EP TRAP: +30.8% gap on 13.7x vol.
Looks incredible but LOW ($5.01) was BELOW open ($5.22)!
Close $5.96 vs high $6.45 = upper wick reversal.
Gap filled over next 2 weeks.
again repeating the pattern of pushing below 50MA

PONY_2025.text: 61% 10EMA, 17 50SMA touches, -49.5% DD, 10.5% ADR.\nNOT TO MY STYLE. 10.5% ADR is new library record. 95% underwater. The most extreme untradable cha

PRAX_2025.text: 66% 10EMA, 16 50SMA touches, -39.1% DD, 6.9% ADR.\nNOT TO MY STYLE. +1090% but untradable. Confirms gain size has zero correlation with tradability.

QURE_2025.text:
Apr 17: +38% gap on 10.4x vol.
But close@28% of range = TRAP EP.
25 touches of 50SMA — worst in library.

SATS_2025.text: 64% 10EMA, 15 50SMA touches, -23.9% DD, 4.9% ADR.\nNOT TO MY STYLE. Below threshold on all key metrics.

SEDG_2025.text:
May 6: +15% gap, close@11% = TRAP.
May 12: +8% gap, close@12% = TRAP.
61% 10EMA, -44% DD. Worst in library.

SEZL_2025.text: 92% 10EMA, 4 50SMA touches, -24.9% DD, 8.6% ADR.\nPARTIALLY TRADABLE. Highest 10EMA in library (92%) but CRWV paradox — 8.6% ADR makes holding uncomfo

SNDK_2025.text: 77% 10EMA, 33 50SMA touches, -19.5% DD, 6.0% ADR.\nNOT TO MY STYLE. 33 50SMA touches — new record. 50SMA metric alone disqualifies this despite othe

STRL_2025.text:
May-Jul: 16 weeks of clean 10EMA grind.
ZERO 50SMA touches. Gold standard chart.
Low ADR (4.7%) = easy to hold.

Aug 5 EP: +9% gap on 2.5x vol.
Acceleration into final leg to $419.

STX_2025.text: 80% 10EMA, 2 50SMA touches, -23.3% DD, 4.0% ADR.\nTRADABLE. STX rivals STRL as best chart. 4.0% ADR = easiest hold in library. 23-week clean

TSEM_2025.text: 82% 10EMA, 10 50SMA touches, -18.2% DD, 4.2% ADR.\nPARTIALLY TRADABLE. TSEM has the shallowest drawdown (-18%) and low ADR. Borderline on 50SMA touches

TTMI_2025.text: 79% 10EMA, 8 50SMA touches, -23.4% DD, 4.7% ADR.\nPARTIALLY TRADABLE. Steady grinder with no catalysts. Low ADR = easy hold but might be too slow for

VSAT_2025.text: 66% 10EMA, 13 50SMA touches, -25.8% DD, 6.7% ADR.\nNOT TO MY STYLE. Another 20EMA stock (77%) misclassified as 10EMA candidate. Below threshold.

VSCO_2025.text: 71% 10EMA, 20 50SMA touches, -26.4% DD, 5.5% ADR.\nNOT TO MY STYLE. 20 50SMA touches. Retail sector AU-type.

W_2025.text: 77% 10EMA, 11 50SMA touches, -28.8% DD, 5.6% ADR.\nPARTIALLY TRADABLE. 4 good EPs, 0 traps — best EP hit rate in library. But 11 50SMA touches = EP tra
